creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to cybermerlin from comment #2)
Mark (or his automated script) did not mean for you to update the summary.  He was just describing what he (or his automated script) did.  In particular, he changed 'poppler' to 'graphics/poppler' in the summary to allow for better conformity in bug reports.  It's easier to categorize & process consistently named bug reports.
